name: lumenward
description: Lumenward — a fast, skill-based retro arcade game. Sweep asteroids, chase brink saves, and guard the final light.
author: Lumenward

scripts.dev: node build.mjs web && node tools/serve.mjs dist/web 5173
scripts.smoke:all: node build.mjs && node tests/smoke.mjs dist/web && node tests/smoke.mjs dist/playables && node tests/smoke.mjs dist/local
scripts.verify: node build.mjs && node --check src/game.js && npm run smoke:all
